'''ihf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellow|yellow]] (color)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ihf
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellow|yellow]] (color)
|-
! Citation form
| ihf
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
